title: Telecom Customer Churn Analysis
shortDescription: A complete end-to-end churn analysis project covering ETL in SQL Server, interactive Power BI dashboards, and a Random Forest ML model to predict future customer churners for a telecom company.

title: Trip Analysis Dashboard
shortDescription: An interactive Power BI dashboard that analyzes Uber trip data to uncover booking trends, revenue insights, and customer behavior patterns. The project leverages advanced DAX, time-based analysis, and data visualization techniques to support data-driven decision-making.

title: Hospital Monitoring Dashboard
shortDescription: An interactive Power BI dashboard monitoring hospital operations across 10 hospitals, featuring treatment cost analysis, admission trends, patient demographics, and $1.4B in billing insights.

title: Machine Learning Model API
shortDescription: RESTful API service that provides machine learning model predictions for various use cases including image recognition and text analysis.

title: Portfolio Website
shortDescription: A modern, interactive portfolio website with 3D animations, smooth scrolling, and responsive design showcasing creative development skills.

title: Task Management System
shortDescription: A collaborative task management application with real-time updates, team collaboration features, and project tracking capabilities.
